field_specs.weight: 0-1 score used for retrieval expansion priority
field_specs.expand_when: When this relation should be expanded during retrieval

prerequisite.meaning: The source node usually requires the target node as prior knowledge

uses_method.meaning: The source node often needs the target method card during explanation or review

confusable_with.meaning: The source node is often confused with the target node

retrieval_rules: First retrieve the primary card of the chosen core leaf node
Expand prerequisite relations before uses_method relations
Only expand confusable_with when the student error suggests concept confusion
Supporting cards should usually be capped at one or two per retrieval
